subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou hast verily raised up the hallowed Temple and the Most Great Talisman in quadrangular form and shape [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی قد بعثت الهیکل المکرم و الطلسم الاعظم علی شکل التربیع فی هیئه
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @da'iras and haykals
